final:
module alu_8bit(  
    input [7:0] A,  
    input [7:0] B,  
    input [2:0] control,  
    output reg [7:0] misleading_result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (control)  
            3'b000: misleading_result = A + B;         // Addition  
            3'b001: misleading_result = A - B;         // Subtraction  
            3'b010: misleading_result = A & B;         // AND  
            3'b011: misleading_result = A | B;         // OR  
            3'b100: misleading_result = A ^ B;         // XOR  
            3'b101: misleading_result = (A < B) ? 8'b00000001 : 8'b00000000; // Comparison  
            3'b110: misleading_result = A << 1;        // Shift Left  
            3'b111: misleading_result = A >> 1;        // Shift Right  
            default: misleading_result = 8'b00000000;  // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule
